installCommand: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8'));if(p.dependencies)delete p.dependencies['@radix-ui/react-button'];if(p.devDependencies)delete p.devDependencies['@radix-ui/react-button'];p.engines={...(p.engines||{}),node:'24.x'};fs.writeFileSync('package.json',JSON.stringify(p,null,2)+'\n')" && rm -f package-lock.json && npm install --include=dev --legacy-peer-deps
